name: The Marchward
descriptionSeed: The habitable border-town between the Redline and the Stillhold — where the violence-pole and the peace-pole both run moderate and TRUTH runs high, because a place that touches both extremes learns to speak plainly or die. The natural base for exploring the Reach: warriors and peace-keepers drink at the same tables here and mean it, uneasily. A both-poles-moderate node — the March itself, made a town. A waygate sits inside the ward's neutral ground, under truce-law: what comes through arrives unarmed by agreement, and the Marchward has hanged people for testing that.
encounterFlavor: Uneasy honest coexistence — a Redline duelist and a Stillhold exile at the same hearth, a truth spoken because pretense is too expensive here, a mediation that could go either way, a place holding its own contradiction in the open.
questSeeds: The Marchward survives by neutrality and someone is trying to break it — pull it toward the Redline or the Stillhold; holding the balance is the work
A Redliner and a Stillholder have fallen in love across the wall and both cultures are appalled; the Marchward is where they've fled
A truth from the Stillhold has leaked here and the Marchward has to decide whether to carry it to the world or bury it again
